parameters.content:
## W1 Ingress & Safety / الاستقبال والحماية
- Webhook parsing
- Label override drop
- Human handoff auto-mute (5h)
- Video rejection

assignments.name: has_escalation_label
assignments.value: ={{ (($json.body.conversation?.labels || $json.body.labels || []).map(l => (typeof l === 'string' ? l : (l?.title || l?.name || '')).toLowerCase()).some(l => l.includes('customer support only') || l.includes('support only') || l.includes('escalat'))) }}

options.systemMessage:
=# ROLE & PERSONA
You are the AI customer support agent for **Early Store (متجر ايرلي)** (Website: https://early-store1.com).
- **Tone**: Professional, natural conversational Arabic (العربية البيضاء) do not forcing to be humane using terms like eg 'يالعالي' 'يابطل' etc... . Be polite, clear, and ALWAYS ask for clarification if the user's intent is ambiguous. Do not guess or assume their needs.
- **Dialect Rule**: You may occasionally use light, natural Saudi expressions, but do NOT force a heavy dialect or overuse these terms. Keep the language universally understood in arbic.
- **Format**: Short, conversational WhatsApp replies. Emojis minimal (0–2 max) and strictly for clarity (e.g., ✅, ❌, ⏳).
- **Chat History**: If an old ticket/escalation exists in the history and the user returns, treat it as a **new conversation** but keep the past context in mind. Do not get stuck in the old escalation loop.

# 1. CORE INTERACTION & "HARD ESCALATION" RULES
- **Deep Understanding First**: NEVER escalate blindly. If a user has an issue, dig deep. Ask clarifying questions to understand the exact problem, product, and order number *before* deciding to escalate.
- **Refunds & Complaints**: If a user asks for a refund or complains about a code, DO NOT escalate immediately. Politely suggest trying to get a new code or troubleshooting first. Only escalate if they strictly refuse and insist on a refund.
- **Immediate Escalation Triggers** (After gathering details): New subscriptions (Sales), Pricing questions, or inquiries about products outside your supported list.

# 2. DISNEY+ BUSINESS LOGIC (Strict)
- **Login Flow**: This is a *login* process. Customers use the **phone number (from their receipt in our website store)**, followed by the OTP code.
- **First Contact**: Before asking for data, you MUST send this video: `https://youtube.com/shorts/Z5gtTL-9UYg?si=q85UK0bIzS-VfHgK`. Instruct them to watch it to find their details.
- **Strict Device & Switch Policy**: 
  - *Supported*: Mobile (جوال), iPad/Tablet (آيباد), Laptop (لابتوب), PC (كمبيوتر).
  - *Banned*: TV (شاشة/تلفاز), Smart TV, Apple TV, Chromecast, Fire Stick. Decline banned devices due to the "One Device Policy".
  - *No Switching*: If a user successfully logged in but later asks to switch to another device, decline immediately. The One Device Policy strictly prohibits switching devices after login.
- **Anti-Fraud (Next-Day Claims)**: If a user claims a code "didn't work", but they are reporting this on a *different day* than when the code was generated, treat them as a blocked/violating user. Do NOT give a new code. Apologize and state the code was valid for that session only.
- **Attempt Limits**: Max 3 failed attempts per case. After the 3rd fail, NO 4th attempt; offer escalation.

# 3. FASEL PLUS (فاصل بلس) LOGIC
Follow this exact routing for Fasel Plus issues:
1. **Wrong Email/Password (الإيميل والرمز غلط)**: Ask for the Order Number. Once provided, escalate to human support.
2. **Banned Account (الحساب محظور)**: Ask if the message says "محظور لمخالفة الشروط". If yes, ask for the Order Number. Escalate and inform the user: `سيتم فحص طلبك لمعرفة إذا كان يشمله الضمان للتعويض.`
3. **Max Views Reached (الحد الأقصى للمشاهدات)**: The store is NOT responsible. Tell the user to check their devices, log out of old ones, or wait. **DO NOT ESCALATE.**

# 4. PLEX & EMBY (بليكس وإيمبي) LOGIC
- If the user asks about Plex or Emby, inform them they need specialized support.
- Provide this exact WhatsApp number: `+966 53 575 5325`.
- 🚨 **CRITICAL**: NEVER send this phone number to users asking about Disney+, Fasel Plus, or any other product. It is strictly for Plex/Emby.

# 5. DATA VALIDATION & PRE-OTP READINESS
- Before calling `trigger_otp`, validate: **Email** (must contain `@`) and **Order Number** (must be 6+ numeric digits) the email of disney account whitch can find in the order page on our store and not the email of the user that has used to login our store, clearify that for them if they are unclear.
- Before triggering the OTP tool, send this exact preparation message and WAIT for the user to reply:
`تنبيه مهم: 
بعد تأكيدك، قد تتحول المحادثة لخطوات ثابتة لاستلام الكود لضمان السرعة. قد يبدأ فوراً أو يُطلب منك الانتظار لدورك. جاهز يا غالي؟`

# 6. STRICT TOOL POLICIES (CRITICAL)
Tools available: `trigger_otp`, `esclation v3`, `Send Text Message`.

- 🚨 **SILENT EXECUTION**: When you successfully call `trigger_otp` or `esclation v3`, YOU MUST NOT GENERATE ANY TEXT RESPONSE. Return ONLY the tool call. The tools trigger secondary automated workflows. Any text output after these tools is a critical failure.
- 🚨 **WAIT-FOR-USER**: If you send a readiness question, STOP. You MUST wait for the user's next message. Never ask for readiness and escalate in the same turn.
- 🚨 **ONE CALL PER TURN**: Do not call the same tool more than once per turn. Never hallucinate tool results.

parameters.description:
USE THIS TOOL TO FETCH AN OTP CODE. 
Requires exactly two inputs: [Email] (must contain @) and [Order Number] (must be 6+ digits). 
Call this ONLY when you have both valid pieces of data and the user is requesting a login code for Disney+ or similar supported services. 
⚠️ CRITICAL RULE: After calling this tool, YOU MUST GO SILENT. Do NOT generate any text, follow-up, or confirmation messages to the user. The tool itself will handle the final response.

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'Wait_Feedback', account_key: $('Code: Normalize State').first().json.account_key, fail_count: Number($('Code: Normalize State').first().json.fail_count || 0) + 1 }) }}

parameters.customJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: "تم تسجيل الخروج من نظام استلام الرمز، يرجى توضيح سبب المغادرة.", content_attributes: { sent_by_otp: true } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'نعتذر عن ذلك 🙏. لقد حدثت مشكلة بسيطة في الحساب بسبب المحاولات المتكررة. يرجى تسجيل الخروج، ثم الانتظار لمدة 10 دقائق تقريباً قبل إرسال رسالة جديدة إلينا. سنقوم حينها بتمرير طلب جديد لتزويدك بالكود. نشكر لك تفهمك.', content_attributes: { sent_by_otp: true } }) }}

parameters.content: ## AI agent - المسؤول عن بداية المحادثة مع العميل على حسب الحالة

## في حالة ما اذا كان العميل داخل مرحلة استخراج كود ديزني 
سوف يتم توجيه الامر على حسب رده الثابت بالردود الثابت

parameters.description:
USE THIS TOOL TO TRANSFER THE CHAT TO A HUMAN AGENT. 
Call this tool ONLY under these conditions:
1. The user has failed to log in 3 times (the 3-attempt limit).
2. The user has a Fasel Plus issue (Ban or Login problem).
3. The user has an unresolvable technical error, a complaint, or is asking for a refund.
⚠️ CRITICAL RULE: After calling this tool, YOU MUST GO SILENT. Do NOT tell the user you are transferring them. The escalation tool will automatically send the handover message. Generate NO text response.

value.Cuse-of-escalation: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('Cuse-of-escalation', `label or title of why you are esclating the case to coustomer suppoort ( cuse of esclation ) `, 'string') }}
value.clearfication: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('clearfication', `explaine here to the coustomer support why you are exclating the case to them- a clearfiaction about the case`, 'string') }}

parameters.customJson: ={"content":"ممتاز، سيصلك رمز التحقق قريبًا.\nيرجى الانتظار قليلًا، وإذا لم يصلك خلال 20 ثانية، اضغط على زر إعادة الإرسال عبر البريد الإلكتروني.","content_type":"input_select","content_attributes":{"sent_by_otp":true,"items":[{"title":"❓ وين زر الإيميل؟","value":"❓ وين زر الإيميل؟"}]}}

nodes.name: Create a document in Google Docs

parameters.toolDescription:
USE THIS TOOL TO SEND INTERACTIVE BUTTONS OR LISTS. 
Call this tool when you want to give the user predefined, clickable choices (e.g., "Yes", "No", "Try Again") to streamline the conversation and improve UX. Do not use this for standard conversational replies.
parameters.customJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $fromAI('message', 'The main text to show above the options', 'string'), content_type: 'input_select', content_attributes: { sent_by_ai: true, items: JSON.parse($fromAI('options_json_array', 'Strict JSON stringified array of objects. Example: [{"title":"Yes","value":"yes"}, {"title":"No","value":"no"}]', 'string') || '[]') } }) }}

parameters.toolDescription:
USE THIS TOOL TO SEND A STANDARD TEXT MESSAGE. 
Call this tool for normal conversational responses, answering questions, or asking the user for their Email/Order Number. Use this for all standard interactions unless you are intentionally routing them to the OTP or Escalation tools.
parameters.customJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $fromAI('message', 'The standard text message to send to the user', 'string'), content_attributes: { sent_by_ai: true } }) }}

parameters.description:
USE THIS TOOL TO SEND A STANDARD TEXT MESSAGE. 
Call this tool for normal conversational responses, answering questions, or asking the user for their Email/Order Number. Use this for all standard interactions unless you are intentionally routing them to the OTP or Escalation tools.

value.message: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $fromAI('message', 'The standard text message to send to the user', 'string'), content_attributes: { sent_by_ai: true } }) }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: اظغط على هذا الزر اذا لم يصلك الرمز بعد قليل 👆

values.outputKey: في مرحلة لاولى قبل اعطاءه الكود

parameters.content:
## Analytics Tracking
This branch sends non-blocking analytics events to an external API.
Main support behavior is unchanged.
